description: Debtor, Creditor, Debtor Agent, and Creditor Agent are mandatory for PAIN messages (e.g. pain.001).
expression: any('.Dbtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.Cdtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.DbtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.CdtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: Mandatory Parties Missing: Debtor, Creditor, Debtor Agent, and Creditor Agent must be provided in the message.
fix: Ensure that the message contains <Dbtr>, <Cdtr>, <DbtrAgt>, and <CdtrAgt> blocks as required bypayment standards.
